title: Copper Horn
description: Re-adds the removed copper horn, which can be used to play different sounds.
body:
The Copper Horn was an item added in the bedrock 1.18 previews and could be used to play different tunes based on player status. It was fully removed in 1.19 as it "didn't fit with design goals".

This datapack adds back the Copper Horn in all of its glory!

Each song (eg. "Great Sky Falling") has three different tunes that can play, if you are looking up anywhere from 45 to 90 (max) degrees it will play the harmony tune (eg. "Great"), if you are sneaking it will play the bass tune (eg. "Falling"), otherwise it will play the melody tune (eg. "Sky")

There are ten variations of the Copper Horn each with a different base song:
| Song      | Recipe |
| :---        | :----: |
| Great Sky Falling      | ![Great Sky Falling Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3ce7f5850231e55d45e2ac142cd4787b4037c44.png)|
| Old Hymn Resting      | ![Old Hymn Resting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab60b1002a24cedeb4cdf02c3e1223e075a0f919.png)|
| Pure Water Desire      | ![Pure Water Desire Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf7abc437ad7494fa3ea807c09d999ca348d3ef4.png)|
| Humble Fire Memory      | ![Humble Fire Memory Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e803bc027f4fff163619986903ca7d6b2797260e.png)|
| Dry Urge Anger      | ![Dry Urge Anger Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae2dacdc58030e6a6a6cb05bb7274405f9735ec9.png)|
| Clear Temper Journey      | ![Clear Temper Journey Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe19bde5687c2f1600e9ea0872a4dee055f0e7ed.png)|
| Fresh Nest Thought      | ![Fresh Nest Thought Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea178b484415987980f27daabaf16718f1ede4f.png)|
| Secret Lake Tear      | ![Secret Lake Tear Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec4be8796a9a0b8084bf29459223975ac0b1c617.png)|
| Fearless River Gift      | ![Fearless River Gift Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6dfd9131843321971d717d5b16000557b51a45b.png)|
| Sweet Moon Love      | ![Sweet Moon Love Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb7a862f42c2a7cb51b15b67560355eae664cef5.png)|

**_NOTICE: This datapack requires the use of a resourcepack. You can either use the standalone linked with the download, or the compiled pack if you plan to use this with my other datapacks._**
